alerts.headline: Coastal Flood Advisory issued February 23 at 9:08PM EST until February 24 at 6:00AM EST by NWS Boston/Norton MA
alerts.description:
* WHAT...Shallow flooding less than one foot deep around the time
of high tide early Tuesday morning.

* WHERE...Eastern Massachusetts coast including Cape Cod and the
Islands.

* WHEN...From 2 AM to 6 AM EST Tuesday.

* IMPACTS...Flooding of vulnerable lots, parks, and roads with
only isolated road closures expected.

nws_forecast.name: Overnight
nws_forecast.detailed: Areas of blowing snow before 1am. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 21. Northwest wind 13 to 16 mph, with gusts as high as 36 mph. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

nws_forecast.name: Tuesday
nws_forecast.detailed: Mostly sunny, with a high near 31. Northwest wind 9 to 13 mph, with gusts as high as 30 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Tuesday Night
nws_forecast.short_forecast: Partly Cloudy then Chance Light Snow
nws_forecast.detailed: A chance of snow after 5am. Partly cloudy, with a low around 14. Southwest wind around 8 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%.

nws_forecast.name: Wednesday
nws_forecast.detailed: Snow before 1pm, then a chance of rain and snow. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 38. South wind 7 to 12 mph. Chance of precipitation is 90%. New snow accumulation of 1 to 2 inches possible.

nws_forecast.name: Wednesday Night
nws_forecast.detailed: Partly cloudy, with a low around 28. Southwest wind around 9 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Thursday
nws_forecast.short_forecast: Mostly Sunny then Chance Light Snow
nws_forecast.detailed: A slight chance of rain between 2pm and 5pm, then a chance of snow. Mostly sunny, with a high near 37. Southwest wind around 8 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%.

nws_forecast.name: Thursday Night
nws_forecast.detailed: A chance of snow before 9pm, then a chance of rain and snow between 9pm and 10pm, then rain and snow likely. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 27. East wind around 8 mph. Chance of precipitation is 60%.

nws_forecast.name: Friday
nws_forecast.detailed: A chance of snow before 9am, then a chance of rain and snow between 9am and 2pm. Partly sunny, with a high near 38. Northwest wind around 8 mph. Chance of precipitation is 40%.

nws_forecast.name: Friday Night
nws_forecast.detailed: Mostly clear, with a low around 25. West wind around 7 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Saturday
nws_forecast.detailed: Mostly sunny, with a high near 43. Southwest wind around 9 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Saturday Night
nws_forecast.detailed: Partly cloudy, with a low around 30. Southwest wind around 9 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Sunday
nws_forecast.detailed: Partly sunny, with a high near 39. Northwest wind around 9 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Sunday Night
nws_forecast.short_forecast: Mostly Cloudy then Slight Chance Light Snow
nws_forecast.detailed: A slight chance of snow after 4am. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 15. Northwest wind around 10 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Monday
nws_forecast.detailed: A chance of snow. Partly sunny, with a high near 28. Northeast wind around 10 mph.
